projects.name: LKS-HUB
projects.project_type: Personal freelancer intelligence, knowledge and automation platform
projects.role: Founder, project architect and system developer
projects.repository_scope: Personal freelancer platform for Luis Kassem Sanz
projects.summary: LKS-HUB is the intelligence, knowledge-management, automation and AI-assistant platform created to support Luis Kassem Sanz's freelancer website, services, business intelligence, content workflows and digital presence.
objectives: Provide relevant curated intelligence for the Insights section of lks.wh.sk
Enable website visitors to ask questions about Luis Kassem Sanz
Explain Luis's verified professional background and services
Answer questions using structured personal, services, projects and news knowledge
Build a long-term searchable knowledge base

completed_components.name: RSS Collector
completed_components.description: Collects current articles from modular RSS feed categories.

completed_components.name: Duplicate Detector
completed_components.description: Removes duplicate articles before further processing.

completed_components.name: AI Relevance Scorer
completed_components.description: Assigns relevance scores and priority levels using a free-first rule-based system.

completed_components.name: Business Intelligence Engine
completed_components.description: Groups and presents high-value intelligence by category.

completed_components.name: Daily Digest Generator
completed_components.description: Creates a compact daily intelligence digest.

completed_components.name: Website Export
completed_components.description: Exports curated intelligence into website-ready JSON.

completed_components.name: Local Intelligence Dashboard
completed_components.description: Displays searchable and filterable intelligence using the approved LKS-HUB visual design.

completed_components.name: SQLite Knowledge Base
completed_components.description: Stores accumulated news intelligence and structured knowledge items.

completed_components.name: Knowledge Search
completed_components.description: Searches stored intelligence using natural-language keywords.

completed_components.name: Knowledge Retriever
completed_components.description: Retrieves relevant news and structured personal knowledge.

completed_components.name: Intent Router
completed_components.description: Determines whether a question concerns Luis, services, projects, news or multiple domains.

completed_components.name: Unified Retriever
completed_components.description: Searches personal knowledge and news through one consolidated retrieval interface.

completed_components.name: LKS AI Assistant
completed_components.description: Provides focused local answers based on verified structured knowledge and stored intelligence.

completed_components.name: Social Post Generator
completed_components.description: Creates draft LinkedIn, Facebook and Instagram content from selected intelligence.

current_limitations: The current assistant uses local rule-based reasoning rather than a full language model
Semantic vector search has not yet been implemented
Social-media posts are drafts and are not automatically published
The production website integration is not yet complete
Knowledge quality depends on the completeness of verified source files
next_development_phases: Complete verified personal and services knowledge
Deploy the Insights module to lks.wh.sk
Introduce approval workflows for social-media content
Add semantic retrieval or LLM integration when appropriate
assistant_rules: Describe LKS-HUB as Luis Kassem Sanz's personal freelancer platform.
Do not describe LKS-HUB as an AKS Models company system.
Do not claim that prototype features are fully deployed when they are only operational locally.
Distinguish automated draft generation from automatic public posting.

projects.name: LKS Global Intelligence Platform
projects.summary: The LKS Global Intelligence Platform collects and filters public information, stores it in a searchable knowledge base and presents selected intelligence through a dashboard and future website Insights section.
assistant_rules: Do not present every collected article as an endorsement.
Distinguish source reporting from LKS-HUB analysis.
Avoid claiming real-time coverage unless the latest pipeline run is current.

projects.name: LKS Website AI Assistant
projects.summary: The LKS Website AI Assistant is intended to answer visitor questions about Luis Kassem Sanz, his verified background, services, projects and relevant current intelligence.
knowledge_scope: Future website pages and frequently asked questions
planned_capabilities: Explain how Luis may support a potential client
response_policy: Do not invent experience, qualifications, prices or availability
Do not expose restricted personal information
Explain uncertainty when information is incomplete
Recommend an initial consultation when project scope requires clarification

projects.name: lks.wh.sk
projects.purpose: Present Luis Kassem Sanz's professional identity, services, background, projects, Insights and future AI assistant.
projects.separation_rule: This website represents Luis Kassem Sanz as an independent freelancer. It must not be presented as the corporate website of AKS MODELS.

projects.name: AKS MODELS
projects.project_type: Separate company and future separate intelligence ecosystem
projects.status: Active company; website live and in progress
projects.summary: AKS MODELS is a separate Slovak legal company founded by Luis Kassem Sanz. Its company website and future AI infrastructure must remain distinct from Luis's personal freelancer platform.
separation_rules: AKS MODELS is a separate legal entity.
Do not merge the AKS Models company profile with Luis's freelancer identity.
Do not use LKS-HUB as the permanent company repository.
Company-specific data should later be transferred into AKS-HUB.
Shared intelligence infrastructure may be reused technically, but branding, knowledge and governance must remain separate.

response_rules: Answer project questions using the specific project record rather than listing unrelated projects.
Clearly distinguish active, prototype, planned and completed functionality.
Never describe social-media drafting as automatic publishing unless publishing integration is actually enabled.
Do not confuse lks.wh.sk with aksmodels.com.
Do not confuse LKS-HUB with the future AKS-HUB.
When discussing website deployment, explain that the current dashboard and assistant are local prototypes unless deployment has been confirmed.
